subtask1.query: Please read query.md in the workspace directory for the problem description and constraints. context/operation_list.md and context/problem_context.md provide stack conventions and reference steps. Referring to the .asm snippets in context, implement a complete LC-3 stack-based calculator (commands X, C, +, *, %, @, neg, D, and digit pushing), and save the complete assembly program to lab2.asm (or answer.asm / solution.asm) in the current directory.
deliverables: lab2.asm or answer.asm / solution.asm - Complete LC-3 assembly source program, including main program, PUSH/POP, all operation subroutines, and data section
